resources.string: Lapho ubuchwepheshe obusezingeni eliphezulu buhlangabezana nokulethwa okungenazihibe ukuze kube lula kuwe.
Thumela noma yamukela amaphasela ngokuphephile, ezweni lonke ngesevisi yethu yokulethwa okusheshayo.
Amaphasela akho aphathwa ngokucophelela futhi alethwa ngokuphephile lapho aya khona.
Thumela noma yamukela amaphasela ngokuphephile, ezweni lonke ngesevisi yethu yokulethwa okusheshayo.
Landelela amaphasela akho ngesikhathi sangempela futhi wazi ukuthi azofika nini.
Silapha ukuze sikusize 24/7 nganoma imiphi imibuzo noma ukukhathazeka ongase ube nakho.
Faka inombolo yakho yeselula futhi sizokuthumelela imiyalelo yokusetha kabusha iphinikhodi yakho
Sithumele ikhodi yokuqinisekisa enombolweni yakho yeselula
Sidinga ukuqinisekisa ubuwena ukuze siqedele ukubhalisa
Thumela amaphakheji ezweni lonke ngokudiliva okuphephile
Phatha iphrofayela yakho kanye nomlando wokulethwa
Bona umzila wakho wokulethwa owabelwe kanye neshejuli
Buyekeza isimo sokulethwa bese wengeza amanothi

Iphakheji yakho icutshungulwe ngempumelelo.

Sicela:
1. Thatha irisidi yakho kanye nelebula yebhakhodi
2. Beka iphakheji yakho Ku-Locker %d
3. Namathisela ilebula yebhakhodi ephaketheni lakho
4. Vala umnyango welokha

Umamukeli uzokwaziswa.
Iseshini iphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ungene ngemvume futhi.
Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela? Yonke idatha efakiwe izolahleka.
Imvume yendawo inqatshiwe. Ayikwazi ukuthola indawo yomthumeli.
Ukusebenzisa indawo ezenzakalelayo. Isignali ye-GPS ayitholakali.
Sicela ubeke iphakheji yakho Ku-Locker %d bese uvala umnyango.
Iphutha lenethiwekhi. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumana kwakho.
Sicela ufake i-OTP enezinhlamvu ezingu-6 evumelekile
Ukungena kokuyimfihlo ayiphumelelanga. Sicela uhlole imininingwane yakho.
I-OTP iphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ucele entsha.
Isikhathi sakho siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ungene ngemvume futhi.
Kukhona into engahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.
Faka imininingwane yochwepheshe ukuze ufinyelele amathuluzi okuxilonga
Sicela ufake ikheli le-imeyili elivumelekile (isb., user@example.com)
Sicela ufake i-ID Kazwelonke evumelekile (Ifomethi: XX-XXXXX-X-XX)
Ayikwazi ukuxhuma ngemva kwemizamo eminingi. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
I-akhawunti idalwe ngempumelelo! Sicela ungene ngemvume.
Skena ibhakhodi yephasela ukuze uqale ukushiya
Bona umzila wakho wokulethwa owabelwe kanye neshejuli
Buyekeza isimo sokulethwa bese wengeza amanothi
Skena noma faka inombolo yokulandelela iphasela:
Thumela amaphakheji ezweni lonke ngokudiliva okuphephile
Phatha iphrofayela yakho kanye nomlando wokulethwa
Sula inqolobane, amalogu, futhi uphathe idatha yohlelo lokusebenza
Ukusetha kabusha kwasefekthri (Qedela ukusetha kabusha uhlelo lokusebenza)
Sebenzisa izimpendulo ze-mock API (imodi engaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi)
Faka inombolo yakho yeselula futhi sizokuthumelela imiyalelo yokusetha kabusha iphinikhodi yakho
Ukuxhumana kwe-RS485 namabhodi afika ku-4 STM32L412 (amalokhi angama-64) nge-Winnsen protocol @ 9600 baud
📋 Imiyalelo: Cindezela okuthi \'Trigger Scan\' bese ukhomba iskena kubhakhodi bese udonsa i-trigger ebonakalayo. Imiphumela ivela ngezansi nezitembu zesikhathi.

Amabhakhodi askeniwe azovela lapha kanye nezitembu zesikhathi...

Chofoza okuthi 'Qalisa ukuskena' ukuze uvule iskena.
Khomba isikena kubhakhodi bese udonsa i-trigger ebonakalayo.
Ulwazi lokuxhumana luzovela lapha uma uxhumekile
Ukuxhuma nge-USB kusetshenziswa i-Custom SpA Android API

I-Hardware Platform: I-Rockchip RK3399-all Android Box
Inguqulo ye-Android: 7.1.2 (API Level 25)
Screen: 10.1" Portrait Orientation

Izingxenye Zehadiwe:
• STM32L412 Locker Controllers (RS485)
• Honeywell03 Customer Xenon2 TG2480HIII Thermal Printer (USB)

Software Stack:
• I-Kotlin ye-Android 7.1.2
• Izixhumanisi ezisebenzisanayo ze-TypeScript
• Ama-API womkhiqizi wangokwezifiso
• Amalabhulali wokuxhumana we-serial
Zonke izimvume kufanele zinikezwe ngaphambi kokuthi ikhiyoski isebenze.
Faka ikhodi enezinhlamvu ezingu-6 ukusuka kudeshibhodi yakho ye-SYS_ADMIN.
Faka amakhodi amafushane elokha asuka Kuphothali Yokuphatha (isb. ZLK4X9M2).
Thepha okuthi \'Qalisa Konke Ukuhlola\' ukuze uqale ukuxilonga inethiwekhi...
Kulokhu kusetha kwekhiyoski, sizosebenzisa idokhumenti yesimeli njengoba kungekho khamera etholakalayo.
Khiqiza amakhodi osekelo futhi unike amandla usizo olukude
Chofoza okuthi \'Qala Iseshini\' ukuze unike amandla usekelo lwesilawuli kude.
Faka imininingwane yochwepheshe ukuze ufinyelele amathuluzi okuxilonga
Sicela unikeze imininingwane yakho yale nqubo yokuthumela.
Umbhalo ongezansi wesilayidi uhamba lapha nencazelo enemininingwane yesici
Sicela ufake iphasela lakho ngaphakathi futhi uvale umnyango ngokuphephile.
Ngiyabonga! Ibuyela kumenyu enkulu ngemizuzwana emi-5...
Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela leli oda?\n\n
Iphutha: Iphakheji yeqa usayizi welokha omkhulu!
Yehlulekile ukuthola amapharamitha eseli yelokha ye-oda eligodliwe.
Sula inqolobane, amalogu, futhi uphathe idatha yohlelo lokusebenza
Nika amandla usizo olukude futhi ukhiqize amakhodi osekelo
Amalogi okuxilonga ohlelo lokusebenza nezingxenyekazi zekhompiyutha (ahlungiwe)
Faka imininingwane yochwepheshe ukuze ufinyelele amathuluzi okuxilonga
Iqoqo le-OTP (ikhodi enamadijithi ayi-6 evela ku-SMS)
Iphinikhodi yamanje kufanele ibe namadijithi ayi-6
Iphinikhodi entsha kufanele ibe namadijithi ayi-6
Sicela uskene noma ufake inombolo yokulandelela
Iphakheji lakho likhulu kakhulu ukuthi lingangena kunoma imaphi amalokha ethu lapha. Sicela ulungise ubukhulu bakho.
Iseshini iphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ungene ngemvume futhi.
Imvume yendawo inqatshiwe. Ayikwazi ukuthola indawo yomthumeli.
Iphutha lendawo. Ukusebenzisa indawo yekhiyoski enikeziwe.
Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela? Yonke idatha efakiwe izolahleka.
Lokhu kuzozama ukuvula ZONKE izikhiya eziyi-16. Qhubeka?
Imodi yesondlo IVALIWE — Ikhiyoski izokhiywa kabusha
Imodi yesondlo IVULIWE — Manje usungakwazi ukufinyelela ohlelweni
Ukubuyekeza ukulayisha kuhlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.
